Title: Corrects a misclassification property tax error on behalf of Tanya Hairston
Summary: Corrects a misclassification property tax error on behalf of Tanya Hairston for the property located at 40 North Tenth Avenue in the city of Mount Vernon for the 2011 - 2020 city assessment tax rolls.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to correcting a misclassification property tax error on behalf of Tanya Hairston
